page_metadata.biotools__summary: This software is a tool to predict functional composition of microbial communities based on communities survey data which builds a pangenome for each OTU and assigns the pangenome’s functional profile to the OTU.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: This software is a tool to predict functional composition of microbial communities based on communities survey data which builds a pangenome for each OTU and assigns the pangenome’s functional profile to the OTU.
